name: Light Pill #17 - The Wind Dancer
description: The Wind Dancer - A glowing capsule that reveals the patterns of air and teaches the art of moving with invisible currents. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Flowing sky-blue silks that billow with unseen breezes
Crystal chimes that ring with the voices of different winds
Bare feet that barely touch the ground
Cloud palace with floating platforms and visible air currents
The wind carries every secret ever whispered, and dances with every soul that learns to listen.

You must dance with three winds - the gentle breeze that carries comfort, the storm wind that brings change, and the still air between breaths that holds ancient wisdom. Each dance will teach you a different way to move through life.
Must be taken in an open space with moving air

properties.ai_prompt: Ethereal fashion editorial of The Wind Dancer in a cloud palace with floating platforms, wearing flowing sky-blue silks that billow with invisible breezes, holding crystal chimes that ring with wind voices. Zephyr Blue aura with Swirling Currents energy, bare feet floating slightly above cloud surfaces, cinematic lighting that shows visible air currents and swirling patterns, 8K, hyperdetailed with visible wind streams and cloud textures.
